$comment: Per-series harvest lists for the Harvest tab. One entry per weekend; the app resolves the weekend by dinner date. Checkbox state lives in the per-dinner Firestore doc (state.harvest). Updated 2026-07-05 after Sam's portal order + the 'Farm Dinner Menu planning' thread: items coming down to the restaurant (green garlic, tomato leaves, lavender, lemon verbena, pasta-lamination herbs & flowers, guanciale, egg yolks) pulled off Kelly's fresh-pick list; only day-of farm picks remain.

weekends.label: July 11-12
weekends.intro: Only what needs picking fresh at the farm this weekend. Everything for the restaurant already came down on Monday's delivery (see the note at the bottom). Sunday repeats Saturday.

items.name: Squash blossoms
items.note: stuffed-blossom bite · pick morning-of, they wilt fast · supplemental W1 from Snow Goose covers any shortfall (Kelly flagged low)

items.name: Sweet peppers
items.note: Course 1 char (the bite peppers are marinated at SF) · supplemental W1 — Sam sourcing the balance if the farm is short

items.name: Eggplant
items.note: Course 1 char · W1: Kelly flagged full replacement, so pick only what's ready — Sam is sourcing the rest off-farm

items.name: Summer squash
items.note: Course 1 char · W1: Kelly flagged full replacement, so pick only what's ready — Sam is sourcing the rest off-farm

items.name: Cabbage
items.note: Course 1 char (farm-picked · the cabbage on the portal order is for the restaurant pork chop, separate)

items.name: Onions
items.note: Course 1 char

items.name: Walla Walla onions
items.note: Course 3 contorni · coal-roasted whole, shared family-style

items.name: Kale
items.note: Course 3 contorni · grilled

items.name: Edible flowers
items.note: farm-side GARNISH only (dessert scatter, bite + Course 1) · the pasta-lamination flowers are ordered and coming down to SF

items.name: Tender herbs (garnish + bites)
items.note: farm-side finishing: thyme for the blossom bite, mint for the pepper toast, garnish herbs · the pasta-lamination herbs (nasturtium, parsley, dill) are ordered and coming down to SF

confirm.name: Guanciale (Tim)
confirm.note: COMING DOWN to SF — sent tomorrow (Sam 7/5), cut, rendered, and folded into the goat cheese filling at the restaurant. Not a farm pick.

confirm.name: Beef (Tim)
confirm.note: at SF — Sully brought 2 (~11 lb + ~9 lb). Leaning to roast the 11 lb for W1 dinner 1 plus a supplemental cut. Rubbed at SF, grilled over apple wood at the farm.

confirm.name: Chicken + duck eggs
confirm.note: already sent to SF for the pasta dough + the cured-yolk cure; just confirm the count held

weekends.footnote: Coming down to the restaurant on Monday's delivery, do NOT pick fresh: green garlic (1-2# for the beef rub), tomato leaves (oil), lavender (honey infusion), lemon verbena (cream infusion), the pasta-lamination herbs & flowers, guanciale, and egg yolks. Eggplant + squash are mostly sourced off-farm for W1 (Kelly flagged low); peppers + blossoms supplemental.

weekends.label: July 18-19
weekends.intro: Only what needs picking fresh at the farm this weekend. Restaurant items came down with Monday's delivery (see the note at the bottom). W2 shifts the dessert fruit to apricots. Sunday repeats Saturday.

items.name: Squash blossoms
items.note: stuffed-blossom bite · pick morning-of, they wilt fast · W2 likely farm-covered (Kelly), Snow Goose backs up any shortfall

items.name: Sweet peppers
items.note: Course 1 char (bite peppers marinated at SF) · W2 likely farm-covered (Kelly)

items.name: Eggplant
items.note: Course 1 char · W2: Kelly likely okay, light supplement if short

items.name: Summer squash
items.note: Course 1 char · W2: Kelly likely okay, light supplement if short

items.name: Cabbage
items.note: Course 1 char (farm-picked)

items.name: Onions
items.note: Course 1 char

items.name: Walla Walla onions
items.note: Course 3 contorni · coal-roasted whole, shared family-style

items.name: Kale
items.note: Course 3 contorni · grilled

items.name: Edible flowers
items.note: farm-side GARNISH only (dessert scatter, bite + Course 1) · pasta-lamination flowers come down to SF

items.name: Tender herbs (garnish + bites)
items.note: farm-side finishing: thyme (blossom bite), mint (pepper toast), garnish herbs · pasta-lamination herbs come down to SF

confirm.name: Guanciale (Tim)
confirm.note: COMING DOWN to SF — cut, rendered, folded into the goat cheese filling at the restaurant. Not a farm pick.

confirm.name: Beef (Tim)
confirm.note: at SF, rubbed at SF, grilled over apple wood at the farm. Confirm the cut held for the second weekend.

confirm.name: Apricots (bought)
confirm.note: dessert fruit shifts to apricots for W2 · local apricots + cherries are good right now (Tim) · bought, not farm

weekends.footnote: Coming down to the restaurant, do NOT pick fresh: green garlic (beef rub), tomato leaves (oil), lavender (honey), lemon verbena (cream), pasta-lamination herbs & flowers, guanciale, egg yolks. W2 farm coverage on peppers/blossoms/eggplant/squash is likely better than W1 per Kelly.
